name: Settlement
doc: The canonical settlement lifecycle (P4-T06 model-checked, P6-T07 bisimilar to the engine). The implemented lifecycle (infra/settle/engine.py, modelled by workflow.settlement_workflow) must map transition-for-transition onto this blueprint.

reviewed_against.verdict: model CURRENT — re-proven bisimilar to the engine (cws-modelcheck/bisimulation: ok=true, bisimilar=true, seeded-extra-transition still fails). The v1.6.0 changes (fail-closed rails/vault footguns, budget-key hygiene) tighten enforcement within existing transitions; no state or transition added.
reviewed_against.h0_rule: self-blueprint must be no older than the last enforcement-surface commit (ci-codeqc/gate)
